title: upsert_space_member bumps SpaceMember state_seq on no-op insert
description: upsert_space_member() uses INSERT OR IGNORE then unconditionally calls bump_state_seq('SpaceMember'). When a member is already present the insert is a no-op but the state token is still incremented, causing spurious JMAP SpaceMember/changes notifications. This function is called on every user_joined relay event, so every reconnect by any existing member generates a false state change for all clients watching SpaceMember. Same root cause as nie-14sh.44 but in store.rs upsert_space_member.
